emails.subject: ConfirmLogic Target Customer List-Legal Entity Name
emails.subject_base: ConfirmLogic Target Customer List-Legal Entity Name
emails.body: ConfirmLogic Target Customer List-Legal Entity Name Sara, See attached spreadsheet which shows the legal entity names by counterparty for each commodity. Name differences between the commodities are highlighted in Blue. Kim Theriot

emails.subject: RE: ConfirmLogic Target Customer List-Legal Entity Name
emails.subject_base: ConfirmLogic Target Customer List-Legal Entity Name
emails.body: RE: ConfirmLogic Target Customer List-Legal Entity Name Kim: Is the legal entity for PacificCorp: PacificCorp Power Marketing, Inc.? Is there only an entity for financial power? Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: RE: ConfirmLogic Target Customer List-Legal Entity Name
emails.subject_base: ConfirmLogic Target Customer List-Legal Entity Name
emails.body: Sorry for the late reply...you may already have your answer... PacifiCorp Power Marketing, Inc. This is the entity they use for Physical. I do not see that they trade any Finanical Power. They have done Nat. Gas financial Swaps with ECC. Kim
